use_cases: Displaying contextual information when users hover over interactive elements
Showing additional details about links, users, or items in list views
Providing tooltips with rich content beyond plain text
Revealing preview information in dashboards or data tables
Offering help text or definitions in educational interfaces
ai_summary: A clean hover card component built with Ark UI that reveals contextual content on mouse hover with smooth fade animations. Features a minimalist design with border styling, shadow, and dark mode support. The card includes a positioning arrow and supports rich content like headings and descriptions. Designed for displaying tooltips, user previews, and supplementary information across various application types.
